titleStmt.title: SII 4.663: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 663. (A.R. No. 215 of 1892). Ibid. page 276, No. 5. ON THE WEST FACE OF THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṁḍalēśvara vīramahēśvara durjjayaku
lakulācalamṛgēṁdra satyahariścaṁdra ku
lōttuṁgacōḍadēvadivyaśrīpādapaṁka
jarajōlulitakuṁtalaśilīmukha sama
ramukhaṣaṇmukha Aniyaṁkabhīma prati
jñāparaśurāma vijayalakṣmīkalatra
parāṁganāputra birudarākṣasanṛsi
ṁha Eladāyasiṁhanāmādisama
stapraśa stisahita(ṁ) śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvaracōḍerāju nādiṁḍlamūlasthāna
mahādēvaraku nakhaṁḍavarttidīpamuna
kiccina goṟiyalu 55 . vīniṁ jēkoni
tabōyu koḍuku prōle yācaṁdrārkka
muṁ butrānupautrakamu nitya māne
ṁḍuneyi diviyakuṁ bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
Ā dēvaraku bōgārtthamugāṁ jōḍerā
ju noṁcinipāṭa niccina kha 130 . vīni
lō nivēdyamunaku kha 13 pūjārula
kukha 3 mūlasthāna kēśavadēvara nivēdyamuṁ
(mu) kha 6 Ī dēvara pūjāri kha 3 paurāṇi
kula kha 4 naṭṭavōju kha 6 maddaliyakā
ru 2 ku kha 6 vaṁśakāru 2 ku kha 6 śaṁku
dhāravāniki kha 3 pāḍeḍu 4 ku nokoka
ḍlaku nāluvusēsi puṭlugā kha 16
mēlunāyaku kha 2 goḍavu kāme
kha 2 bōyu viddavallabhi kha 3 3 dāḍepōju
māca kha 2 kha 4 kōṭa nāga kha3
mukhari sūrama
vennaka kha 3 sabbedāra kha 3 palledāma kha 3
gōkana sūra kha 3 gaḍiyana būma kha 3
vēmaka Eṟiya kha 3 komma Eṟiya kha 3
podaṟa bolla kha 3 taṁtrapālavaidana
nūṁku kha 3 kāmakuppa kha 3 gasaḍakomma kha 3
Ī cōḍerāju tama talli bādamadēvula
ku dharmmārtthamugā mūlasthānamahā
dēvaraku maṟiyu nokadīpaṁbuna kiccina
goṟi 25 [. *] vīniṁ jēkoni prōle yā
caṁdrārkkamuṁ dana putrānupautrakamu
nitya māneṁḍu neyi diviyaku neccōnu
ṁḍiyuṁ bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu . yī dē
vara nivēdyamunakuṁ gāpana kuṁṭayu
musiyana ceṟuvunuṁ gēśavadēvarakuṁ ba
ṭṭadāsekuṁṭa prōlebōyu kha 1 poyi
gāramu keṁdāmara kanne kha 2 kāra
pāka kha 2 bōyuṁ buliyana kha 2
nōju jakkōjunaku kha 2 kētebō
yu prōle kha 2 [Ī] dēvara kābhara
ṇamulusēseḍivāru nāḍi
ṁḍla yekkasāla manavarttikā
ma Ajjeprōlela kha 3 Eṟa
bōyu prōle kha 1
la prōlāśāri kha 2 . cenōju
ko pōlamu na mādōju prōlō
ku sagaṁ bālu
The last five lines (ll. 56-60) are not shown on the photo-litho bāvama kūṁtuṟu mēḍama kha 3
Ī cōḍerājunu suṁkyaveggaḍa māvenayu
mādenayu maṁḍalaṁbunu śrīmūla
sthāna mahādēvara ṭivīsa
Digital edition of SII 4.663 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
